route.name: Home
route.description: Grocery store home page with featured products and category links

route.name: Product Detail
route.description: Individual product page with details, price, and add to cart

route.name: Shopping Cart
route.description: View cart items, adjust quantities, and proceed to checkout

api-endpoint.description: Add a product to the shopping cart
Update quantity of a cart item
Remove an item from the cart

page.summary: Grocery store home page. Shows a grid of featured products with images, names, and prices. Category cards link to Produce, Dairy, Bakery, and Beverages.
Produce category. Grid of fresh fruits and vegetables with product cards showing image, name, price.
Dairy category. Grid of milk, cheese, yogurt, and eggs.
Bakery category. Grid of bread, pastries, and baked goods.
Beverages category. Grid of juices, water, coffee, and drinks.
Product detail page. Large product image, full name, description, price, and Add to Cart button.
Shopping cart. Lists added items with quantity controls, per-item total, and Proceed to Checkout button.
